expectations.text: Identifies negative-only formatting instructions as the anti-pattern
expectations.evidence: Section 1 explicit: 'Negation is a weak control signal' with salience-flip / replacement-behavior arguments

expectations.text: Proposes a positive-framing fix (show correct shape, not list prohibitions)
expectations.evidence: Full positive rewrite shown with avoid/use pairs

expectations.text: Identifies the aggressive ALL-CAPS emphasis as a secondary anti-pattern
expectations.evidence: Mentioned in 'What not to do' bullet ('Don't ALL-CAPS the rules') but not surfaced as a diagnostic finding or paired with the Claude-4.5+ overtriggering mechanism

expectations.text: Cites at least one external authoritative source (URL)
expectations.evidence: Zero URL citations in the entire response. References 'Anthropic', 'post-training', etc. only by name

expectations.text: Provides a concrete rewritten prompt or sample replacement text
expectations.evidence: Full rewritten prompt shown with Voice / Response pattern / Language guidance sections
